title: Financial Advisors
author: Galacho1210
selftext:
Hello all,

I opened a brokerage account in one of the major banks in the US. I was contacted by the financial advisor in July 21 and I invested in his suggested portfolio during August 21 which are medium to low risks Hedge Funds. So far I must be 10% down. My financial advisor insists that I keep my positions claiming that these Mutual Funds have an active management and will recover. Should I trust him?

Does the Financial Advisor receive a commission for every investment on a particular Hedge Fund?

Thanks
